description: Linear is a fast, lightweight issue tracking and project management tool designed for software teams, offering streamlined workflows, integrations, and a focus on speed and usability.
authentication: OAuth 2.0 (client credentials grant) and API key authentication for REST endpoints; supports JWT for webhooks
self_serve: Yes – users can sign up for a free tier directly on the website and upgrade via the in-app billing interface
api_surface: REST API with endpoints for issues, projects, teams, users, sprints, and webhooks; GraphQL API available for advanced queries
mcp: No – Linear does not provide a managed cloud platform for hosting; it is a SaaS service hosted by Linear itself
buildability: Linear offers SDKs for JavaScript/TypeScript and a command-line interface for automating issue creation and updates; supports CI/CD integrations via webhooks and API
main_blocker: Limited support for custom fields and complex workflow automation compared to larger competitors
